metadesc_generate_http_security_he.zh: 生成 HTTP 安全标头。HSTS、CSP、X-Frame-Options、Permissions-Policy。Nginx、Apache、Express 配置。安全等级 AF。

subtitle_configure_http_security_h.zh: 配置 HTTP 安全标头，检查您的成绩，并导出 Nginx、Apache、Express 和 Caddy 的配置。

metadesc_visual_semver_range_calcu.en: Visual semver range calculator. See which versions match ^, ~, >=, and complex ranges. Interactive timeline visualization.
metadesc_visual_semver_range_calcu.zh: 可视化语义版本范围计算器。查看哪些版本与 ^、~、>= 和复杂范围匹配。交互式时间线可视化。

h3_version_bumps_from_esc_ve.zh: 版本号从 ${esc(ver)} 开始递增

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for learning Service Worker caching strategies with live code examples and visual diagrams.
metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.zh: 交互式练习场，用于学习 Service Worker 缓存策略，包含实时代码示例和可视化图表。

subtitle_interactive_guide_to_cach.en: Interactive guide to caching strategies, lifecycle, and update patterns
subtitle_interactive_guide_to_cach.zh: 缓存策略、生命周期和更新模式的交互式指南

subtitle_check_the_cache_first_if.en: Check the cache first. If a cached response exists, serve it immediately. Only go to the network if the resource isn't in the cache. This is ideal for assets that rarely change — fonts, images, CSS/JS with versioned URLs.
subtitle_check_the_cache_first_if.zh: 首先检查缓存。如果缓存中已有响应，则立即提供。只有当资源不在缓存中时才访问网络。这对于很少更改的资源（例如字体、图像、带有版本化 URL 的 CSS/JS）非常理想。

subtitle_always_try_the_network_fi.en: Always try the network first. If the network responds, cache the result and serve it. If the network fails (offline, timeout), fall back to the cached version. Best for content that needs to be up-to-date — API responses, news feeds, user profiles.
subtitle_always_try_the_network_fi.zh: 始终先尝试连接网络。如果网络响应正常，则缓存结果并立即提供。如果网络故障（离线、超时），则回退到缓存版本。这种方法最适合需要保持最新状态的内容，例如 API 响应、新闻推送和用户个人资料。

subtitle_serve_the_cached_version.en: Serve the cached version immediately (fast!), but simultaneously fetch the latest version from the network and update the cache in the background. The user sees stale content now but gets fresh content on the next visit. Great for content that updates but isn't time-critical.
subtitle_serve_the_cached_version.zh: 立即提供缓存版本（速度很快！），同时从网络获取最新版本并在后台更新缓存。用户现在看到的是旧内容，但下次访问时即可看到最新内容。非常适合会定期更新但对时间要求不高的内容。

subtitle_only_serve_from_the_cache.en: Only serve from the cache. Never go to the network for this request. The resources must have been pre-cached during the install phase. This is the simplest strategy and guarantees offline availability for known assets.
subtitle_only_serve_from_the_cache.zh: 仅从缓存提供服务。此请求绝不通过网络访问。资源必须在安装阶段预先缓存。这是最简单的策略，可确保已知资源的离线可用性。

subtitle_always_go_to_the_network.en: Always go to the network. Never use cache. This is equivalent to having no Service Worker for this request, but you can still add logging, analytics, or request modification. Use for requests that must always be live — login, checkout, real-time data.
subtitle_always_go_to_the_network.zh: 始终使用网络访问，切勿使用缓存。这相当于此请求不使用 Service Worker，但您仍然可以添加日志记录、分析或请求修改功能。适用于必须始终保持在线的请求，例如登录、结账和实时数据。

subtitle_a_service_worker_goes_thr.en: A Service Worker goes through a specific lifecycle: registration → installation → waiting → activation. Understanding this lifecycle is crucial for handling updates correctly and avoiding unexpected behavior.
subtitle_a_service_worker_goes_thr.zh: Service Worker 遵循特定的生命周期：注册 → 安装 → 等待 → 激活。理解这个生命周期对于正确处理更新和避免意外行为至关重要。

metadesc_interactive_shadow_dom_vi.en: Interactive Shadow DOM visualizer. Explore open vs closed shadow roots, style encapsulation, slot distribution, ::slotted(), ::part(), adoptedStyleSheets. 5+ live presets.
metadesc_interactive_shadow_dom_vi.zh: 交互式 Shadow DOM 可视化工具。探索开放式与封闭式 Shadow 根、样式封装、插槽分布、::slotted()、::part()、adoptedStyleSheets。5 个以上的实时预设。

h3_open_vs_closed.zh: 开放式 vs 封闭式

h3_styled_via_adoptedstylesh.zh: 通过 adoptStyleSheets 进行样式设置

metadesc_convert_text_to_url_frien.en: Convert text to URL-friendly slugs. Remove accents, special characters, and replace spaces with hyphens.
metadesc_convert_text_to_url_frien.zh: 将文本转换为适合URL的别名。移除重音符号、特殊字符，并将空格替换为连字符。

subtitle_convert_text_to_url_frien.zh: 将文本转换为 URL 友好的别名

title_spacing_calc_design_syste.zh: 间距计算 — 设计系统间距比例生成器

subtitle_design_system_spacing_sca.zh: 设计系统间距比例尺生成器。

title_storage_access_api_playgr.zh: 存储访问 API 演示区

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Storage Access API - manage cross-site cookie access and storage partitioning in the browser.
metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.zh: Storage Access API 的交互式演示环境 - 在浏览器中管理跨站点 cookie 访问和存储分区。

jtc_api_not_available_simulat.en: API not available (simulating: true for first-party)
jtc_api_not_available_simulat.zh: API 不可用（模拟：对于第一方为 true）

jtc_cookies_blocked_third_par.zh: Cookie：已阻止（第三方 Cookie 已弃用）

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Streams API - ReadableStream, WritableStream, TransformStream, backpressure, teeing, and fetch pipelines.
metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.zh: Streams API 的交互式演示平台 - ReadableStream、WritableStream、TransformStream、反压、分流和获取管道。

h2_custom_source_sink_implem.zh: 自定义源和接收器实现

h3_timer_stream_pushes_data.zh: 定时器流（每 500 毫秒推送一次数据）

h3_collecting_sink_buffer_al.zh: 收集接收器（缓冲所有数据块）

h3_fast_producer_slow_consum.zh: 生产速度快，消费速度慢

h3_custom_source_with_backpr.zh: 具有反压感知功能的自定义源

h3_custom_sink_with_batching.zh: 带批处理功能的定制水槽

h3_full_pipeline_source_tran.zh: 完整流程：源 → 转换 → 接收器

h3_stream_text_decoder_pipel.zh: 流 → 文本解码器管道

h3_byte_stream_with_auto_all.zh: 带自动分配功能的字节流

subtitle_create_readable_streams_f.en: Create readable streams from custom sources and consume them chunk by chunk.
subtitle_create_readable_streams_f.zh: 从自定义源创建可读流，并逐块消费它们。

subtitle_pull_based_data_is_enqueu.en: Pull-based: data is enqueued on demand when the consumer requests it.
subtitle_pull_based_data_is_enqueu.zh: 拉取式：数据在消费者请求时按需加入队列。

subtitle_writablestream_receives_d.en: WritableStream receives data chunks and processes them through a sink.
subtitle_writablestream_receives_d.zh: WritableStream 接收数据块并通过接收器进行处理。

subtitle_transformstream_sits_betw.en: TransformStream sits between readable and writable, transforming data as it flows through.
subtitle_transformstream_sits_betw.zh: TransformStream 位于可读和可写之间，在数据流经时对其进行转换。

subtitle_backpressure_occurs_when.en: Backpressure occurs when the consumer is slower than the producer. The stream's internal queue fills up, signaling the producer to slow down.
subtitle_backpressure_occurs_when.zh: 当消费者执行速度慢于生产者时，就会发生背压。数据流的内部队列会填满，从而发出信号，要求生产者减慢执行速度。

subtitle_tee_splits_a_readablestre.en: tee() splits a ReadableStream into two independent branches. Both receive all chunks. The original stream becomes locked.
subtitle_tee_splits_a_readablestre.zh: `tee()` 函数将一个 `ReadableStream` 分成两个独立的分支。两个分支都接收所有数据块。原始流会被锁定。

subtitle_implement_custom_underlyi.en: Implement custom underlying sources and sinks with full lifecycle control.
subtitle_implement_custom_underlyi.zh: 实现具有完整生命周期控制的自定义底层数据源和数据接收器。

subtitle_sink_that_batches_incomin.en: Sink that batches incoming chunks and flushes when batch is full or stream closes.
subtitle_sink_that_batches_incomin.zh: 接收批量数据并于批次满或流关闭时进行刷新的接收器。

subtitle_process_fetch_responses_a.en: Process fetch responses as streams for progressive loading and real-time processing.
subtitle_process_fetch_responses_a.zh: 将处理获取的响应作为流进行渐进式加载和实时处理。

subtitle_since_we_can_t_fetch_arbi.en: Since we can't fetch arbitrary URLs from a playground, this simulates a streamed response using a ReadableStream.
subtitle_since_we_can_t_fetch_arbi.zh: 由于我们无法从 playground 获取任意 URL，因此使用 ReadableStream 模拟流式响应。

subtitle_byob_bring_your_own_buffe.en: BYOB (Bring Your Own Buffer) readers allow zero-copy reads into pre-allocated buffers. This is optimal for binary data processing.
subtitle_byob_bring_your_own_buffe.zh: 自带缓冲区 (BYOB) 读取器允许将数据零拷贝读取到预分配的缓冲区中。这对于二进制数据处理来说是最佳选择。

btn_chain_split_words_upperca.en: Chain: Split Words → Uppercase → Add Index
btn_chain_split_words_upperca.zh: 链式操作：拆分单词 → 转换为大写 → 添加索引

btn_run_batching_sink_batch_s.zh: 运行批量水槽（批量大小：3）

btn_default_vs_byob_compariso.zh: 默认设置与自带酒水对比

placeholder_enter_text_to_write_to_st.en: Enter text to write to stream...

label_consumer_speed_ms_chunk.zh: 消费者速度（毫秒/数据块）：

metadesc_obfuscate_text_using_vari.zh: 使用各种编码对文本进行混淆：Base64、十六进制、ROT13、反向编码、二进制编码、Atbash 密码。

subtitle_transform_text_using_vari.en: Transform text using various encoding and obfuscation methods
subtitle_transform_text_using_vari.zh: 使用各种编码和混淆方法转换文本

metadesc_interactive_structuredclo.zh: 交互式 structuredClone() 测试环境。测试深度克隆后哪些内容会保留下来。可视化原始版本与克隆版本之间的差异。函数、DOM、符号、getter——看看会发生什么。

h3_what_survives_structuredc.zh: 结构化克隆（structuredClone()）之后哪些内容会存活？

h3_structuredclone_compatibi.zh: 结构化克隆兼容性参考

metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.zh: structuredClone 的交互式游乐场——深度克隆演示、支持的类型矩阵、传输列表、性能基准测试等等。

h3_performance_json_parse_vs.zh: 性能：JSON.parse 与 structuredClone 的比较

title_subnet_calculator_cidr_bi.zh: 子网计算器 — CIDR、二进制可视化、子网分割器

title_svg_optimizer_clean_minif.zh: SVG优化器 — 清理、压缩和预览SVG代码

metadesc_optimize_svg_files_remove.en: Optimize SVG files. Remove comments, metadata, editor attributes. Minify whitespace. Preview live. Copy as data URI. No upload needed.
metadesc_optimize_svg_files_remove.zh: 优化 SVG 文件。移除注释、元数据和编辑器属性。压缩空白字符。实时预览。复制为数据 URI。无需上传。

subtitle_clean_minify_and_preview.en: Clean, minify, and preview SVG code
subtitle_clean_minify_and_preview.zh: 清理、压缩和预览 SVG 代码

placeholder_paste_your_svg_code_here.zh: 请将您的SVG代码粘贴到这里……

jtc_optimized_svg_will_appear.zh: 优化后的SVG将显示在此处……

status_click_on_canvas_to_add_po.en: Click on canvas to add points. Select a command type from the toolbar.
status_click_on_canvas_to_add_po.zh: 点击画布添加点数。从工具栏中选择命令类型。

jtc_smooth_cubic_1_2_points_p.zh: 光滑立方：放置 1/2 个点

metadesc_generate_custom_svg_place.en: Generate custom SVG placeholder images with text, background color, and custom dimensions. Perfect for prototyping and wireframes.
metadesc_generate_custom_svg_place.zh: 生成带有文本、背景颜色和自定义尺寸的自定义 SVG 占位符图像。非常适合用于原型设计和线框图绘制。

subtitle_generate_custom_svg_place.en: Generate custom SVG placeholders for prototyping
subtitle_generate_custom_svg_place.zh: 生成用于原型设计的自定义 SVG 占位符
